title: podman remote-client restart containers
body:
add the ability to restart containers with the remote-client

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body: No tests you can turn on?
corrected a booboo and turned on the restart tests
Needs a rebase to get the SELinux fixes.
